title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1069
summary: Vaibhav Yadav, a student at IIIT-Delhi, was arrested after being intercepted while receiving a courier containing 50 LSD blots allegedly ordered by co-accused Arnav Dhankar via dark web. The parcel was sent to Vaibhav’s college address and recovered by authorities during an investigation into a s...
